seo_title: Rivian to Deliver First R2 SUVs on June 9
meta_description: Rivian has set a date for the first customer deliveries of its R2 SUVs, which CEO RJ Scaringe calls "maybe the most important thing we’ve launched to date."
body_html:
Rivian will deliver the first R2 SUVs on June 9, according to CEO RJ Scaringe.

Production TimelineFirst customer deliveries: June 9Production capacity: 1.75 million units per yearManufacturing locations: United States and ChinaRJ Scaringe's VisionKey Points"Maybe the most important thing we’ve launched to date." - RJ Scaringe, CEOScaringe emphasizes the significance of R2 SUVs in Rivian’s product lineupRivian’s Expansion Plans"We’re committed to making electric vehicles accessible to everyone," - RJ Scaringe, CEOChallenges AheadCompetition from established automakersRegulatory hurdles in the US and ChinaSupply chain management and logistics

source.title: Rivian will deliver the first R2 SUVs on June 9
source.summary: Rivian plans to deliver its first R1T electric pickup trucks and R2 SUVs on June 9. The delivery date was announced by CEO RJ Scaringe, who described the vehicles as "maybe the most important thing we've launched to date". No further details are provided in the excerpt about the vehicles or their specifications.
